notes: Christian figure mentioned by Jerome as a faithful brother, likely a cleric or monk.

docs.title: Letter LXXX
docs.author: Jerome
docs.excerpt: But your persistence, most faithful brother Macarius, is so great that even want of ability cannot resist it. Thus, to escape the constant importunings to which you subject me, I have given way contrary to my resolution; yet only on these terms that, so far as is possible, I am to
